body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
* Unifies 2M microphysics and P3 schemes (with an option to skip ice phase microphysics)
* Simplifies and unifies parameter containers
* Removes a few remaining `PhasePartition` objects

title: Unification of 2M+P3 and simplification of parameter handling
